title: M1 Mac buy-list — first laptop, gaming mouse, headphones, TV
html:
M1 Mac buy-list — first laptop, gaming mouse, headphones, TV

Source: 2021-09-15 Apple Note. Pre-college OSU freshman setup list — Best Buy and Walmart links to a 13" M1 MacBook Pro, Logitech G305 gaming mouse, Sony WH-1000XM4 headphones, and a 24" Vizio TV. Tiny but historically significant.

TL;DR

  • First-ever laptop spec captured for college: Apple M1 MacBook Pro 13", 8GB/256GB, space gray — the machine he'd use through OSU until the M4 in late 2024.
  • Logitech G305 wireless gaming mouse + Sony WH-1000XM4 headphones — Yahir was setting up a productivity rig, not a gaming rig.
  • 24" Vizio TV via Best Buy curbside — likely for the dorm room.
  • Bookmarks the start of the CS-coursework era at OSU — this M1 is the machine that runs everything from CS162 to Supabase uploads for Brotein.
  • The spec-list-as-note format (just URLs and prices) is classic apple-notes junk-drawer usage.

Pattern observed

Captures a gear-acquisition micro-genre in the corpus: similar lists appear for the Chengdu trip, the Austin move, and elsewhere. Yahir tracks his physical infrastructure with the same diligence as his ideas.

Open questions

  • Was the M1 actually purchased? (Most likely yes — it shows up later being shipped to JCEF for refunds.)
  • Did the Logitech G305 survive China?

Related

  • osu
  • brotein — built on this same machine
